verses.text: Topa in Moses kiangah, “A masa tawh a kibangin suangpeek nih sui in. Na sukkhap a masa suangpeekte sunga om thute tuate tungah ka gelh kik ding hi
Kithawi-in Sinai Mual tungah zingsangin hong paito in la, mual dawn tua munah keima kiangah hong kilak in
Nang tawh kuamah hong paito khawm sak kei in la, mualtung tengah kuamah omsak kei in. Tua mual mai-ah tuuhon ahi a, bawnghon ahi zongin gamta sak kei in,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Moses in a masa bangin suangpeek nih a sui hi. Zingsang ciangin amah tho baihin, Topa in amah a thupiaksa bangin Sinai Mual tungah paito a, a khutsungah suangpeek nih a tawi hi
Meii sungah Topa kum sukin tua lai-ah Moses tawh ding a, Topa in ama min a pulak hi
Ama mai-ah Topa pai-in, “Topa, Topa, hehpihna nei-in a dik Pasian; lungduai-in itna kip leh thutakna tawh a dim

mi tul tampite-a' dingin itna kip a nei; mawhna, thu palsatna leh khialhna maisakin; ahih hangin bangbang hita leh mawhna a khahkhong ngeilo; pate' mawhna tate' tung leh tute' tung, khang thum khang lina dongin a thukpa,” ci-in a pulak hi
Moses in leilak lamah a lu kunin a bia hi

Amah in, “Tu-in na muhna-ah maipha ka muh leh, Topa aw, kong thum hi; lungkhauh mite ka hita uh zongin kote' kiangah Topa hong pai in. Kote' mawhna leh kote' khialhna hong maisak in la, nangma mi dingin kote hong sang in,” a ci hi.

Topa in Moses kiangah, “En in, keimah in thuciamna khat ka bawl hi. Nangma mi khempeuh' muhna-ah, leitung khempeuh hita leh minam khatpeuh sungah hita leh cikmahin tua bang a kibawl ngeilo na lamdangte ka bawl ding a, note' lakah a om mite khempeuh in Topa' nasepna mu ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh note' tungah kong bawl ding na pen a kihtakhuai thu ahi hi
“Tuni-a kong thupiak zui in. En in, na mai-ah Amor mite, Kanaan mite, Hit mite, Perez mite, Hiv mite, leh Jebus mite ka hawlkhia ding hi
Na paina leitangah a teng mite tawh thuciamna bawlkha kei in la, tua pen note-a' dingin thangzak a suahkhak lohna dingin nangmahmah kidawm in
Nangmah in amau' biakna taute phelin, amau' biakna khuamte kuaitanin, amau' Asherah milimte na phukpai ding hi
“(Pasian dang na bia kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa, ama min Aam a hipa pen a aam Pasian ahi hi

Nangmah in tua leitangah a teng mite tawh thuciamna bawlkha kei in. Amaute in amau' pasian-te tawh paktatna bawlin amau' pasian-te' tungah biakna pia-in, khatpeuh in note hong sap ciangin, note in ama biakpiakna na ne khading uh a
note in amau' tanute na tapate uh-a' dingin la-in, amau' pasian-te tawh paktatna a bawl a tanute in amau' pasian-te tawh na tapate uh paktatsak khading uh hi
“A kisung pasian-te note-a' dingin bawlin na bia kei ding uh hi

“Silngo sawhloh anlum pawi na bawl ding uh hi. Abib kha, a kisehsa hun sungteng, nang kong thupiak mah bangin ni sagih sung silngo sawhloh anlum na ne ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Abib kha sungin Egypt panin note na paikhia uh hi
“Mihing leh ganhing tacil a pa khempeuh keima-a' ahi hi
La a tacilte tuuno khat tawh na tanh ding uh hi. Na tat kei uh leh a ngawng na kuaitan ding uh hi. Na tapa cilte khempeuh uh na tanh ding uh hi. Keima mai-ah a guakin kuamah hong kilaklo ding hi
“Ni guk sung na na sem ding uh a, ahi zongin a ni sagih ni-in na tawlnga ding uh hi. Lokhawh hun leh anlak hun sungin zong na tawlnga ding uh hi
“Nipikalte' pawi, mangbuh a tung masa pawi, leh kum bei ciangin an kaihkhop pawi na bawl ding uh hi
“Pasal khempeuh Israel Pasian, Topa Pasian' mai-ah kum khatin thumvei kilak ding uh hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh note' mai-ah minam dangte ka hawlkhia ding a, na gamgite uh nomau-a' dingin ka keek ding hi. Topa na Pasian uh' mai-ah kum khatin thumvei a kilak dingin na paitoh sungun na leitang uh mi khat peuhpeuh in a hong deihgawh khak ding lunghihmawhna omlo ding hi
“Note in silngo tawh keimah biakpiakna si na pia khawm kei ding uh a, Paisan Pawi biakpiakna zong zingsang dong na omsak kei ding uh hi
“Note in na anpalte uh lakah a tung masa pen Topa na Pasian uh' inn-ah na paipih ding uh hi. “Note in keelno a pi' nawizu tawh na huan kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Topa in Moses kiangah, “Hih thute gelh in. Hih thute tawh kizui-in nang leh Israel tawh thuciamna khat ka bawlzo hi,” a ci hi
Tua lai-ah sun sawmli leh zan sawmli sung Topa tawh Moses om a, tua hun sungteng anletui a ne kei hi. Amah in suangpeek tungah thuciamna kammalte ahi thupiak sawmte a gelh hi.
A khutsungah thuciamna suangpeek nih tawh Sinai Mual tung panin Moses hong paisuk ciangin, Pasian tawh amah kiho khin ahih manin a maitang vun a taan' lamtak Moses in theilo hi
Aaron leh Israel mite khempeuh in Moses a muh ciangin, a maitang vun na taang a, ama mai-ah a pai ding uh amaute lau uh hi
Ahih hangin amaute kiangah Moses pai hi. Aaron leh mihon makaite khempeuh ama kiangah hong paikik uh a, Moses in amaute hopih hi
Tua khit ciangin Israel mi khempeuh a nai-ah hong pai uh a, Topa in Sinai Mual-ah ama tunga a gen khempeuh thupiakna-in amaute tungah a pia hi
Moses in amaute tawh thugen a man khit ciangin, amah in a maitangah kiliahna puan khat a koih hi

Ahih hangin Topa tawh a kiho dingin ama mai-ah Moses a tum peuhpeuh ciangin, amah a pusuah kik mateng a kiliahna puan la khia hi. Amah hong paikhia-in ama tungah a kipia thute Israel mite kiangah a gen ciangin
Israel mite in Moses' maitang vun a taang mu uh hi. Amah tawh a kiho dingin a pai matengin Moses in kiliahna puan tawh a maitang a khuh kik hi.
